footer.description: This institution is striving to build an ideal welfare society by following the footsteps of the Prophet of Humanity, the Messenger of Human Freedom and Peace, the ideal of human service, the Prophet Muhammad (PBUH), in the service of humanity.
footer.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Ilmera Foundation (IERF) - All rights reserved.

home.hero_desc: Ilmera Education and Research Foundation (IERF) is a non-political, non-profit humanitarian organization dedicated to social welfare, community development, academic research, and international higher-education support.
home.tax_rebate: Donate to Ilmera Foundation. Click for details.

core_pillars.subtitle: For Ummah, With Sunnah
core_pillars.education_desc: Promoting academic research in social sciences and development studies, while providing scholarship guidance, academic mentorship, and structured support for students seeking international higher-education opportunities.
core_pillars.service_desc: Conducting structured humanitarian and welfare initiatives including emergency response, poverty alleviation, Ramadan food distribution, and long-term support for vulnerable communities through a transparent and impact-driven approach.
core_pillars.dawah_desc: Providing comprehensive guidance for higher education abroad, including scholarship consultation, application assistance, academic mentoring, and research-oriented preparation for global academic opportunities.

Must be interested in serving humanity.
Must work with honesty and responsibility.

about_page.title: About Us
principles_list: Adhering to ethical integrity, humanitarian values, and research-based approaches in all activities.
Maintaining a non-profit, non-political, and inclusive identity focused solely on social welfare, education, and research.
Upholding unity, social harmony, and mutual respect within communities.
Promoting evidence-based solutions to social challenges through academic research and development studies.
Responding to humanitarian crises with structured planning, transparency, and measurable impact.
Ensuring compassion and dignity in serving vulnerable and marginalized communities.
Providing support and services regardless of religion, race, gender, or background.
Treating donations and entrusted resources as a sacred responsibility and ensuring proper utilization.
Maintaining full transparency in financial management and public reporting.
Ensuring accountability of management, staff, and operational processes.
Implementing both internal and external audit systems for organizational integrity.
Upholding the highest standards of honesty, ethics, and zero tolerance toward corruption or malpractice.
Ensuring professionalism and quality standards across welfare, research, and educational programs.
Operating independently without political affiliation or influence.
Recruiting competent professionals and strengthening capacity through continuous training.
Prioritizing disadvantaged groups including the poor, disaster-affected families, women, and students from underprivileged backgrounds.
Promoting sustainable development through education, skill development, and poverty alleviation initiatives.
Focusing on long-term social impact and intellectual development rather than temporary assistance.

education: Promote research in social sciences and development studies addressing real-world challenges.
Provide structured scholarship guidance and academic mentorship for students seeking international higher education.
Develop research initiatives, publications, and academic collaborations at national and global levels.
Support meritorious and underprivileged students with guidance, academic resources, and preparatory assistance.
Organize seminars, workshops, and training programs focused on research skills and higher-education readiness.
Encourage youth participation in research, innovation, and global academic opportunities.
dawah: Provide comprehensive guidance for students applying to foreign universities and scholarship programs.
Assist in application preparation, documentation, and academic planning.
Conduct workshops on study abroad opportunities, research proposal writing, and career pathways.
Create awareness about ethical leadership, global citizenship, and intellectual responsibility.
Build partnerships with international institutions and academic networks.
Develop digital resources and mentoring platforms to support higher-education aspirants.
service: Conduct emergency relief operations during natural disasters and humanitarian crises.
Implement poverty alleviation programs focused on sustainable income generation.
Organize Ramadan food distribution and seasonal humanitarian initiatives.
Support vulnerable communities through structured welfare programs.
Promote community development initiatives based on research-driven insights.
Encourage long-term rehabilitation and resilience-building rather than short-term aid.
